single_responsibility: Synthesize signals and scores into operator-ready intelligence briefs

required.opportunity_scores: array — optional for market snapshot, required for opportunities
required.target_competitor_slug: string — required when scope is competitor

output.intel_brief: object<{summary: string, key_signals: array<string>, risks: array<string>, recommended_next_commands: array<string>}>

description: Specialized subagent for intel synthesizer tasks within the department field context.
